options.content: Ethereum Arbitrum Base BNB Hyperliquid Monad Solana TON
Global EU Asia

#### Description

This dashboard provides real-time and historical performance analytics for RPC nodes across major providers.

* Click region buttons to view metrics from different locations
* Adjust time range for historical analysis
* Hover over info icons for detailed metric descriptions

 

#### Data collection

Response times are measured by our Python service on [Vercel serverless functions](https://github.com/chainstacklabs/compare-dashboard-functions), sending requests every 1-3 minutes from three regions.

Response times exceeding 55 seconds are considered failures and excluded from charts.

All requests use latest blocks except "archive" methods (⌛), which query historical blocks (1-2 days ago).

ℹ️ If not specified, the first paid RPC provider plan (named Growth as a rule) is used for monitoring.

 

#### How we rank providers

We evaluate RPC providers based on their **speed** (response time) and **reliability** (success rate) across three regions.

* The **lower** the score, the **better** the provider
* Even small success rate drops (99% vs 97%) significantly impact the final score
* Performance is measured equally across all regions

```plaintext
Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
```

panels.description:
We evaluate RPC providers based on their speed (response time) and reliability (success rate) across three regions.

Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
panels.title: Provider score (lower is better)
What is the p95 response time and overall success rate?

panels.description: p95 response time across all metrics per provider, segmented by request origin region.
panels.title: By data collection region

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time((response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON", response_status="success"} >= 0)[$__range:$__interval])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time((response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON"} >= 0)[$__range:$__interval])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: p95 response time per API method for each provider, aggregated across all regions.
panels.title: By API method
What is the p95 response time in each region?

panels.description: p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.

Each row is a provider-region. Lag is relative to the best provider in the same region. Color shows severity: green = at tip (≤2 blocks), yellow = slightly behind (3-10), orange = behind (10-20), red = significantly behind (>20).

targets.expr: -1 * (max by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="TON", response_status="success"}) - on(source_region) group_left max by (source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="TON", response_status="success"}))

panels.title: Block lag timeline

panels.description: Block lag tracking summary. % at Tip = percentage of time seqno lag ≤ 2 (tip is best provider in same region). Success Rate = getMasterchainInfo reliability.

targets.expr: 100 * (1 - avg_over_time((clamp_min(-1 * (max by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="TON", response_status="success"}) - on(source_region) group_left max by (source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="TON", response_status="success"})), 0) > bool 2)[$__range:1m]))

sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Block lag summary

panels.description: Historical response time per provider-region pair, showing trends in runGetMethod requests.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON", api_method="runGetMethod", response_status="success"})

panels.title: runGetMethod

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON", api_method="runGetMethod", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="TON", api_method="runGetMethod"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
